title: Cropdusting
description: A weird little datapack that adds a new item, Crop Dusters!
body:
# Cropdusting
Cropdusting allows you to make crops grow! The crop dusters are a set of leggings. Put on the leggings and nothing noticeable will happen (yet). Once you stand on a block with crops on it, hold down sneak for a few seconds and the crop will grow up by 1 stage! By default, this will take away 1 level but in the future I'm planning on making this amount configurable.

I have <ins>**NOT**</ins> tested this pack on all of the versions listed, but I ***believe*** it should work from 1.15-1.20.4 (v2.1) and 1.21.5-26.2 (v2.2).

## Settings
- Settings for this pack are available using `/trigger settings`
    > Make sure to press the Save button!
- To reset settings to defaults, use `/trigger reset`

#### Currently while the XP configuration can be found in the settings menu, it does not work!  (As of v2 Beta)

## Supported Crops
- Wheat
- Beetroot
- Carrots
- Potatoes
- Pumpkins
- Melons
- Nether Wart

## Crafting Recipe

![Cropduster Crafter Recipe Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BnYqE46p/images/738cecd27c6818d50ddcee381f6e288310c95faf.png)

## Planned Updates

```
- Upgradable Cropdusters
- Configurable XP Cost (50%)
- Time Cooldown Option
✅ Configurable Time
```

## Possible Cosmetic Updates
```
✅ Particle Effects when crop dusting
- Model for leggings
```

#### If you have any suggestions or find any issues please let me know!
